subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The people are oblivious indeed. One must take great pains to help them appreciate the degree of agitation that had seized the apostles of Christ
subcodes.first_line_orig: مردم خیلی غافلند باید آنها را بزور فهماند که در زمان مسیح چه قدر مضطرب
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
